prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年苏州大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约19360名、22816名、29958名、26778名、23010名。2021至2023年位次持续后移（从19360降至29958 ），2024年回升至26778，2025年进一步回升至23010，近两年呈回暖趋势，2025年较2023年回升约6948名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年57人、2022年53 人、2023年51人、2024年55人、2025年51人；2026年综合类计划46人、医学类计划12人，合计58人，较2025年综合类51人增加约13.7%，属于明显扩招，对竞争有一定 缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第46名，近年排名稳定在40–46名区间，属于211高校中上游水平；2024年声誉偏正面（食堂改善获好评）；2026年声誉偏负面（涉及校园安全事件）；抖音热度为较热，总排名第46位，短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；未见明显 投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，体育学、药学获评A-，另有多个B+学科；医学类（临床医学、放射医学等）为传统优势方向，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业保持高热推荐；山东省2026年高考 报名总人数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，属长三角经济发达地区，对山东省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生人数占比较高，2025年山东招生约109人，占全国 总招生约18.2%，属于重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次23010名、2026年扩招约13.7%（计划从51人增至58人）、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%加剧竞争、声誉 偏负面有轻微影响等因素。预测2026年最低录取位次约24955名，区间24455–25455名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Soochow University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 19360, 22816, 29958, 26778, and 23010 respectively. Rankings continuously declined from 2021 to 2023 (from 19360 to 29958), rebounded to 26778 in 2024, and further rebounded to 23010 in 2025, showing a warming trend in the past two years, with an increase of about 6948 places in 2025 compared to 2023. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province comprehensive category was 57 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 51 in 2025. In 2026, the comprehensive category plan is 46 and the medical category plan is 12, totaling 58, an increase of about 13.7% compared to 51 in 2025 comprehensive category, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 46th, with stable rankings in the 40–46 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level among 211 universities. In 2024, its reputation was relatively positive (cafeteria improvements received praise); in 2026, its reputation is relatively negative (involving campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity is relatively high, ranking 46th overall, with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education and Pharmacy received A-, and there are multiple B+ disciplines. Medical fields (Clinical Medicine, Radiation Medicine, etc.) are traditional strengths, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity. Medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao registrants in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) from 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, a developed area in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates. The university enrolls a relatively high proportion of students from Shandong, with about 109 students from Shandong in 2025, accounting for about 18.2% of total national enrollment, making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 23010, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 13.7% (plan increased from 51 to 58), the increase in Shandong candidates by about 5.7% intensifying competition, and the slightly negative reputation having a minor impact, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 24955, with a range of 24455–25455.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 24955, with a range of 24455–25455. Candidates with rankings at the lower bound of 24455 or below can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Law, etc.). Candidates with rankings around the midpoint of 24955 are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Mathematics, Teacher Training, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprint. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound of 25455 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering relatively lower-ranked Tier 2 majors. Application popularity remains high, so sufficient ranking buffer should be reserved.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 苏州大学医学类在山东省2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为28525、12768、31426、26045、26492，波动较大。2021年位次28525，2022年大幅上升至12768（计划从10人扩至11人 ），2023年回落至31426（计划缩至8人），2024年回升至26045（计划扩至12人），2025年微降至26492（计划扩至13人）。2026年医学类总计划为12人，较2025年减少1人，缩招 约7.7%。缩招将导致竞争加剧，位次有上行压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学是211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，位于江苏省苏州市。学校医学学科实力雄厚，拥有临床医学、放射医学等优势专业，在华东地区具有较高声誉，对 山东考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等专业竞争尤为激烈。苏州大学地处长三角经济发达地区，城市吸引力强，且医学类专业就业前景良好，进一步推高 了报考热度。山东省医学类招生规模相对有限，供需矛盾较为突出。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年趋势分析，预测2026年苏州大学医学类最低录取位次约为25570名。2026年缩招1人，叠加医学报考热度不减，位次较2025年（26492）略有上升（ 位次数字减小，更易进），但受限于缩招幅度有限，上升空间不大。预计录取位次在25070至26070之间波动。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical programs in Shandong Province from 2021 to 2025 were 28525, 12768, 31426, 26045, and 26492, showing significant fluctuations. In 2021, the ranking was 28525; in 2022, it rose sharply to 12768 (enrollment expanded from 10 to 11); in 2023, it fell back to 31426 (enrollment reduced to 8); in 2024, it rebounded to 26045 (enrollment expanded to 12); and in 2025, it slightly decreased to 26492 (enrollment expanded to 13). The total enrollment for medical programs in 2026 is 12, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a reduction of approximately 7.7%. This reduction will intensify competition, putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a national Double First-Class university, located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province. The university has strong medical disciplines, with advantageous specialties such as clinical medicine and radiation medicine, and enjoys a high reputation in East China, making it highly attractive to Shandong candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has continued to rise, with fierce competition in specialties such as clinical medicine and stomatology. Soochow University is located in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, with strong urban appeal, and medical programs offer good employment prospects, further boosting application enthusiasm. The enrollment scale for medical programs in Shandong Province is relatively limited, leading to a prominent supply-demand imbalance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculations and historical trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical programs in 2026 is approximately 25570. With a reduction of 1 enrollment slot in 2026 and sustained high popularity of medical programs, the ranking is expected to rise slightly compared to 2025 (26492) (a smaller ranking number indicates easier admission), but the limited reduction in enrollment means the upward potential is small. The predicted admission ranking is expected to fluctuate between 25070 and 26070.
